dict.string: ﻫ·٥ﻧﻼﺂ needs calendar access to sync events you've confirmed to Apple Calendar.
ﻫ·٥ﻧﻼﺂ needs full calendar access to create and manage events you've confirmed in Apple Calendar. Without this, confirmed events stay in the app only.
ﻫ·٥ﻧﻼﺂ needs reminders access to create reminder items for your tasks.
ﻫ·٥ﻧﻼﺂ needs accessibility access to read text from your screen and help with what you're viewing.
